cta.description: Book a consultation and we will create an individual care program especially for you
cta.title: Ready to start your journey

master.name: Nadia Khalakhan
master.paragraph1: For over 5 years I have been helping people gain confidence through skin care. My specialization is deep work with problem skin and anti-age programs.
master.paragraph2: I have trained at leading European academies and regularly attend masterclasses and conferences to stay up to date with the latest advances in cosmetology.
master.quote: For me, every client is a unique story. I don't just perform procedures — I create a path to a better version of yourself.
master.subtitle: Studio Founder
master.title: Certified Cosmetologist-Aesthetician

mission.paragraph1: LumaSkin is a space where modern technologies meet an individual approach. Each procedure is created especially for you, taking into account the characteristics of your skin and your goals.
mission.paragraph2: We use only premium products and proven methods so that you can trust us with the most valuable thing — your health and beauty.
mission.subtitle: Our Philosophy
mission.title: We believe that beauty is not only appearance, but inner harmony

items.name: Maria K.
items.text: Anna is a true professional! After a course of cleansings my skin transformed. Finally found my master!

items.name: Katarzyna W.
items.text: Very happy with the peeling result. Skin became smooth and radiant. Cozy studio, great atmosphere.

items.name: Agnieszka N.
items.text: I've been going for facial massage for 6 months. The lifting effect is visible! Anna is always attentive and professional.

items.name: Ewa S.
items.text: Wonderful studio and excellent master. Individual approach, quality products. Highly recommend!

features: Sterility and compliance with all safety standards
studio.paragraph: Every detail at LumaSkin is carefully thought out. From soft lighting to comfortable temperature — everything is designed so you can completely relax.
studio.subtitle: Our Space
studio.title: The Studio is Created

items.title: Individual Approach
items.desc: No two clients are the same. Each program is developed individually for your needs and skin type.

items.title: Premium Quality
items.desc: We use only proven brands and luxury products. No compromises on quality.

items.title: Scientific Approach
items.desc: All procedures are based on proven methods and the latest research in cosmetology.

items.title: Trust and Care
items.desc: Your comfort and safety are our priority. We create an atmosphere of trust and care.

items.title: Continuous Development
items.desc: We regularly train and master new techniques to offer the best.

items.title: Visible Results
items.desc: We work for long-term effect, not temporary results. Your skin will thank you.

contact.text: If you have questions or want to book by phone:

items.question: Is a prepayment required?
items.answer: No, prepayment is not required. Payment is made after the procedure at the salon.

items.question: Can I reschedule or cancel a booking?
items.answer: Yes, you can reschedule or cancel no later than 24 hours before the procedure.

items.question: What if I am late?
items.answer: If you are less than 15 minutes late, we will try to keep the full service. For longer delays the procedure time may be reduced.
